description: An old server is being retired. An agent must ensure it is safely removed from the network.

nodes.task_description: Verify that no active services are still pointing to the old server's IP address.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms there are no active DNS records or configurations for the server.

nodes.task_description: Disable the switch ports connected to the server.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully disables the correct switch ports.

nodes.task_description: Remove the server's IP address from any firewall rules or access control lists.

expected_outcome.value: Agent cleans up all related firewall rules.
